log.title: 3 scopes signed; Crestview begins design May 25
log.summary: 3 scopes of work approved and signed by Philippe Normand on May 15. Réquisitions and SOF submitted by Marie-Élise around May 19. Debrief email sent to Crestview and comms/marketing synergy meeting held May 21. Crestview begins full program design week of May 25.

log.title: Champions program alignment meeting — partnership portfolio reviewed and prioritized
log.summary: Team aligned on Champions program structure and budget across agency fees, partnerships, and influencer campaigns. Five partnership streams assigned to Marie-Élise Jarry. Influencer strategy confirmed: awareness-focused, top-performing content to be selectively amplified, amplification rights to be included in agreements. Lise Arsenault to define content creator shortlist. Vanessa Zieman to evaluate paid media boosting and advance hockey and tennis negotiations. Cirque du Soleil deferred due to high cost. Biweekly working group to follow once program direction confirmed.

log.title: Contracts sent; presentation held May 14
log.summary: Contracts received May 14 and sent by Marie-Élise to Philippe Normand for signature. Presentation to Philippe Normand and Vanessa Ziemans held May 14.

risks.title: Cirque du Soleil — high cost and rigid package structure
risks.description: Cirque du Soleil proposal deemed too expensive and sponsorship package not flexible enough for current budget. Deferred to a future milestone year. Custom activation could potentially be negotiated but no current path forward.

files.title: Champions
files.memory: Champions program active. Lead: Marie-Élise Jarry. 3 scopes of work approved and signed (Philippe Normand, May 15). Réquisitions et SOF submitted ~May 19 by Marie-Élise. Debrief email to Crestview and comms/marketing alignment meeting held May 21. Crestview begins full program design week of May 25. External champions and content creators: deployment June–July. Internal amplifiers: deployment August. Five active partnership streams: Eugene Levy content collaboration, Indigo, Children's Hospital & Cause Partnerships, Influencer & Content Creator Campaign, Sports & Events Partnerships. Budget confirmed; awareness campaigns prioritized this summer; additional spend starting late August. Cirque du Soleil deferred — high cost, rigid package. Biweekly working group to be established with agency once program direction confirmed.

openQuestions.question: Which partnerships should be prioritized within current budget constraints?
Should the Indigo partnership scope stay limited to content, or expand to a broader commercial integration?
Should influencer efforts be merged into a single campaign structure with a shared budget?
What is the exact Eugene Levy production timeline, and does it align with VIA Rail's rollout schedule?

files.title: Assemblée publique annuelle (APA) 2025

William-Antoine edits and finalizes texts June 1 — done. Dry-run June 8 with Mathieu, Carl, Jonathan — Karl and William-Antoine both attending. Recording at CASACOM June 11. Post-production and written answers to July 10. Online July 16 at 16h.
